518.description: Familiar, random co-op baby (changes per floor)

519.name: Lil Delirium
519.description: Familiar, transforms into a random familiar every 10 seconds

521.name: Coupon
521.description: Makes one random buyable item free

522.name: Telekinesis
522.description: Petrifies and then reflects enemy tears

523.name: Moving Box
523.description: Stores all pickups / pedestals in the room, then spawns them when used again

524.name: Technology Zero
524.description: Electric tears (tears are connected by electricity that deals 1x dmg / tick)

525.name: Leprosy
525.description: Spawns temporary orbitals on hit (7 dmg / tick)

526.name: 7 Seals
526.description: Familiar, transforms into a random horseman every 10 seconds (all deal contact damage and spawn locusts)

527.name: Mr. Me!
527.description: Summons a helper to interact with whatever you target

528.name: Angelic Prism
528.description: Orbital, tears that pass through it split into 4

529.name: Pop!
529.description: Eyeball tears (tears are not affected by range and can bounce off of each other)

530.name: Death's List
530.description: Grants random rewards for killing enemies in order

531.name: Haemolacria
531.description: Blood tears (arcing tears that explode into many smaller tears that deal 50-80% dmg)

532.name: Lachryphagy
532.description: Hungry tears (tears that don't hit enemies combine and eventually split)

534.name: Schoolbag
534.description: Can carry 2 active items instead of 1

535.name: Blanket
535.description: 1-hit shield when entering a Boss Room

536.name: Sacrificial Altar
536.description: Sacrifice up to 2 familiars, spawns a passive Devil Room item for each one, single use

537.name: Lil Spewer
537.description: Familiar, charged attack that spawns creep, changes form on pill use, spawns a random pill on pickup

538.name: Marbles
538.description: Chance to smelt a trinket on hit, spawns 3 random trinkets on pickup

539.name: Mystery Egg
539.description: Familiar, spawns a charmed enemy on hit

540.name: Flat Stone
540.description: Bouncing tears (tears bounce on the ground, 0.25x splash dmg)

542.name: Slipped Rib
542.description: Orbital, reflects enemy projectiles, does no contact damage

543.name: Hallowed Ground
543.description: Spawns a white poop on hit (makes an aura that halves tear delay + 1.25 dmg multiplier + chance to block damage)

544.name: Pointy Rib
544.description: Familiar, bobs back and forth (1x contact dmg)

545.name: Book of the Dead
545.description: Converts killed enemies into temporary orbitals or charmed Bonies

546.name: Dad's Ring
546.description: Yellow ring that petrifies enemies on contact

548.name: Jaw Bone
548.description: Familiar, can grab pickups like a Boomerang

549.name: Brittle Bones
549.description: Removes all red hearts, big bone splash and tears up when a bone heart is lost

550.name: Broken Shovel
550.description: Used in the Booster Pack #5 quest

551.name: Broken Shovel
551.description: Used in the Booster Pack #5 quest

552.name: Mom's Shovel
552.description: Used in the Booster Pack #5 quest, spawns a trapdoor (10% chance for crawlspace)

553.name: Mucormycosis
553.description: Chance to shoot spore tears that stick on enemies and can split into small spore tears

555.name: Golden Razor
555.description: +5 coins, spend 5 coins on use to gain temporary dmg up in the current room

557.name: Fortune Cookie
557.description: Spawns a soul heart / card / fortune teller

558.name: Eye Sore
558.description: Extra tears are fired in random directions

559.name: 120 Volt
559.description: Auto fire lightning arcs at enemies in close proximity

560.name: It Hurts
560.description: Ring of bloody tears + temporary tears up on hit

563.name: Nancy Bombs
563.description: +5 bombs, bombs explode with a random effect

565.name: Blood Puppy
565.description: Familiar that attack enemies and grows stronger, can attack the player and need to be killed to be a puppy again

566.name: Dream Catcher
566.description: Reveals next boss and treasure room items in level transitions + half soul heart every floor

567.name: Paschal Candle
567.description: +0.4 tears up for each room cleared (max 6), resets on hit

568.name: Divine Intervention
568.description: A shield that reflects bullets, brimstone lasers and knock back enemies

569.name: Blood Oath
569.description: Familiar that trades extra red health for damage and speed at the beginning of a floor

570.name: Playdough Cookie
570.description: Random status effect tears (normal/petrify/homing/poison/fear/freeze) + random colors to tears

571.name: Orphan Socks
571.description: Immunity from spike and creep damage

573.name: Immaculate Heart
573.description: Additional set of orbiting spectral tears

575.name: The Intruder
575.description: Add 4 slowing tears, chance to spawn blue spiders and release Intruder familiar on hit

576.name: Dirty Mind
576.description: Dips become friendly, spawns friendly Dips when destroying poop

577.name: Damocles
577.description: Double item pedestals, chance of permanent death after the first hit when activated

581.name: Psy Fly
581.description: Orbital, reflects enemy projectiles as homing tears

582.name: Wavy Cap
582.description: Every time you use it : +0.75 tears, -0.03 speed, distorts graphics/sound for the current floor

583.name: Rocket in a Jar
583.description: +5 bombs, allow to shoot a rocket in the direction where you shoot

584.name: Book of Virtues
584.description: Spawn a wisp orbital that have the effect of the active item that is inside the book

585.name: Alabaster Box
585.description: Converts soul/black hearts to Angel Room items + random number of soul hearts

586.name: The Stairway
586.description: Start of each floor has ladder to a special Angel Shop

588.name: Sol
588.description: Reveals location of the boss, Sun card effect + active item recharge + 2x dmg + +1 luck + removes curses upon killing the boss

589.name: Luna
589.description: Extra secret and super secret rooms on each floor that contains a blue light beam that gives half a soul heart + tears up for current floor

592.name: Terra
592.description: Rock tears (knockback, can destroy obstacles), random slight dmg up/down on some tears

593.name: Mars
593.description: Double tap to dash, invincible when dashing on enemies

594.name: Jupiter
594.description: Build up gas by standing still, release lingering fart clouds and speed goes down when moving

595.name: Saturnus
595.description: Grants orbiting tears aura refreshing per room, can transform enemy tears into friendly tears

596.name: Uranus
596.description: Ice tears (enemies killed will become frozen and can be kicked)

597.name: Neptunus
597.description: Charge an attack that makes you shoot several tears with decreasing fire rate

598.name: Pluto
598.description: Size down, can pass between blocks

599.name: Voodoo Head
599.description: Generates 2 Curse Rooms per floor, improved curse room layouts/rewards

600.name: Eye Drops
600.description: Tears up only on left eye

601.name: Act of Contrition
601.description: +1 eternal heart, allows Angel Rooms even if a devil deal has been taken

602.name: Member Card
602.description: Every shop has a trapdoor to a special shop

603.name: Battery Pack
603.description: Recharges active item, spawns 3 random batteries on pickup

605.name: The Scooper
605.description: Spawns a temporary familiar similar to The Peeper

606.name: Ocular Rift
606.description: Chance to shoot rift tears (summons rifts that attract + deal contact dmg)

609.name: Eternal D6
609.description: Like a D6, but has a chance to make the item disappear

610.name: Bird Cage
610.description: Spawns bird familiar when hit (similar to Dead Bird) that stomps enemies

611.name: Larynx
611.description: Release a sonic waves (power depends on the number of charges) that damage enemies and destroys rocks

612.name: Lost Soul
612.description: Familiar, 1 hit per floor, if it survives it grants a random reward

614.name: Blood Bombs
614.description: Bombs leave behind red creep, can plant bombs for 1/2 heart, heals 5 hearts

615.name: Lil Dumpy
615.description: Familiar, makes stun/poison farts when an enemy or projectile is about to hit the player

616.name: Bird's Eye
616.description: Chance to shoot a big red fire

617.name: Lodestone
617.description: Chance to shoot magnetizing tears (attract enemies + tears + projectiles)

618.name: Rotten Tomato
618.description: Chance to shoot marked tears (other enemies will attack a marked enemy)

621.name: Red Stew
621.description: Full heal, dmg up that wears off over time

622.name: Genesis
622.description: Resets player to its initial state and teleport the player to a room where he can pick as many items as they had before

623.name: Sharp Key
623.description: Consumes a key and throws it to deal damage / open doors, +5 keys on pickup. Killed enemies have a chance to spawn rewards from a chest

625.name: Mega Mush
625.description: Gigantify for a short duration (+damage, +2 range, -tears, invulnerable, crush rocks/blocks/doors)

626.name: Knife Piece 1
626.description: Collect the pieces to get a knife familiar

627.name: Knife Piece 2
627.description: Collect the pieces to get a knife familiar

628.name: Death Certificate
628.description: Allows you to choose one item among all items in the game

629.name: Bot Fly
629.description: Familiar, orbits and fires shielded tears

631.name: Meat Cleaver
631.description: Splits all enemies in the room into 2 smaller versions

632.name: Evil Charm
632.description: Fear, burn, confusion, toxic gas cloud and Dogma's Godhead tears immunity

633.name: Dogma
633.description: Grants fly + a holy mantle. Heal the player to 6 hearts if he has less than 6 hearts

634.name: Purgatory
634.description: A red crack spawns at a random position, standing on it will cause a soul to fly to the nearest enemy and hit it

635.name: Stitches
635.description: Spawns a temporary familiar, can swap positions with the familiar to deal damage

636.name: R Key
636.description: Restarts the game to the first floor but keeps all items

637.name: Knockout Drops
637.description: Chance to shoot fist tears (knockback + stun), knocking enemies into walls or other enemies damage them

638.name: Eraser
638.description: Throw on an enemy to permanently remove that enemy from the current run, recharge every floor

640.name: Urn of Souls
640.description: A flamethrower weapon that collects one soul per enemy killed

641.name: Akeldama
641.description: Spawns bloody tears behind the player

642.name: Magic Skin
642.description: Converts 1 red heart / 2 soul hearts to a broken heart, spawns a pedestal item

643.name: Revelation
643.description: Grants flight and an additional angelic beam attack

644.name: Consolation Prize
644.description: Stat up on the lowest one, +3 coins or +1 bomb or +1 key (depending on lowest)

645.name: Tinytoma
645.description: Orbital, splits into blue spiders on hit

646.name: Brimstone bombs
646.description: +5 bombs, bombs now do a Krampus cross effect on explosion

647.name: 4.5 Volt
647.description: Active items now only charge based on damage dealt

649.name: Fruity Plum
649.description: Baby Plum familiar that propel itself diagonally by shooting tears

651.name: Star of Bethlehem
651.description: A star that moves from starting room to boss room with a Hallowed Ground aura (tears/dmg up + chance to block damage)

652.name: Cube Baby
652.description: A frozen baby familiar that can be kicked

653.name: Vade Retro
653.description: Spawns a little red ghost for each enemy killed and explode when you use the active item again

654.name: False PHD
654.description: Good pills become bad or neutral pill. Stat down pill grants a dmg up, other bad pills gives a black heart

655.name: Spin to Win
655.description: A spinning familiar, holding use key gives +0.5 speed + orbitals spin faster and deal more dmg

656.name: Damocles
656.description: Double item pedestals, chance of permanent death after the first hit when activated

657.name: Vasculitis
657.description: Killed enemies shot blood tears in random directions

658.name: Giant Cell
658.description: Spawn mini Isaacs that follow you and attack enemies when hit

660.name: Card Reading
660.description: Spawn 2 of 3 different portals in starting room (red goes to boss room, yellow to treasure room, blue to secret room)

661.name: Quints
661.description: Killed enemies drop a baby familiar that stays in place and shoot in the same direction as the player

663.name: Tooth and Nail
663.description: Transforms the player into a spiked stone statue for 1 sec every 5 sec, invincibility + contact dmg on statue form

664.name: Binge Eater
664.description: For each item you'll see, a food item is proposed. Food items give 2 stat ups and a temporary dmg up

665.name: Guppy's Eye
665.description: Shows the content of chests, fires and shopkeepers

667.name: Strawman
667.description: A Keeper familiar that acts as a second player and has its own HP and items

668.name: Dad's Note
668.description: Sends you on the backwards path, no gameplay effect

670.name: Options?
670.description: Can choose between two room reward pickups

671.name: Candy Heart
671.description: Minor random stat up for every red heart picked up

672.name: A Pound of Flesh
672.description: Devil deals cost money, shop items cost hearts, shop pickups require to take damage

673.name: Redemption
673.description: Dmg up + half soul heart at the start of next floor if you took nothing in the devil deal

674.name: Spirit Shackles
674.description: On death, turn into Forgotten's Soul chained to a dead Blue Baby, revives if still alive after 10 sec

675.name: Cracked Orb
675.description: On hit: reveal a random room, open adjacent locked/secret rooms, break tinted rocks or rocks that hides a ladder

676.name: Empty Heart
676.description: Grants an empty heart container if you enter a new floor with 1 red heart or less

677.name: Astral Projection
677.description: On hit: stop time and turn into the lost. Revert into original char on hit or room clear

679.name: Lil Abaddon
679.description: Familiar that fires a Maw of the Void ring

680.name: Montezuma's Revenge
680.description: Fires a short diarrhea Brimstone backwards

681.name: Lil Portal
681.description: A familiar that spawns a portal to an unexplored room if it absorbed enough pickups

682.name: Worm Friend
682.description: A tentacle that lurks underground and randomly grabs an enemy

684.name: Hungry Soul
684.description: Killed enemies have a chance to spawn a homing soul that chases enemies and attack them

685.name: Jar of Wisps
685.description: Spawns a random wisp + another random wisp for every past uses (up to 12)

686.name: Soul Locket
686.description: Minor random stat up for every soul heart picked up

687.name: Friend Finder
687.description: Spawns a random controllable friendly enemy

688.name: Inner Child
688.description: +1 life. On revive, explode and turn into a tiny version of Isaac with higher speed

689.name: Glitched Crown
689.description: Pedestals rapidly cycle between 5 random items

690.name: Belly Jelly
690.description: Chance to reflect shots and negate contact damage, bouncing the enemies instead

691.name: Sacred Orb
691.description: Prevents quality 0 and 1 items from appearing. 33% chance for quality 2 items to be rerolled

692.name: Sanguine Bond
692.description: Spikes in front of devil statue, taking damage on them can yield various rewards

693.name: The Swarm
693.description: Grants a halo of fly orbitals, turn them into blue flies on hit, +1 orbital fly per room clear

695.name: Bloody Gust
695.description: Tears and speed up on hit (resets every floor)

696.name: Salvation
696.description: Grants an aura that makes enemies exploding in a cross of lightbeams after few seconds in it, gets bigger on hit, shrinks upon entering new floor

697.name: Vanishing Twin
697.description: Familiar that turns into a hostile copy of any boss encountered, boss rooms yield double rewards

698.name: Twisted Pair
698.description: Gives two small demons that copy the player's tears (37.5% of player's dmg for each demon)

699.name: Azazel's Rage
699.description: Builds rage every time a room is cleared, fires a large Brimstone at full rage upon entering next room

700.name: Echo Chamber
700.description: Every time a card/pill is used, it also trigger the 3 previous pill/cards used

701.name: Isaac's Tomb
701.description: Chest appears in the starting room of each floor, gives at random: 3 soul hearts, 3 trinkets, Old Chest item, Angel item

702.name: Vengeful Spirit
702.description: Spawns an invincible red wisp every time the player takes damage, wisps disappear on next floor

703.name: Esau Jr.
703.description: Toggle between current char and a mini Esau that starts with high damage and 3 black hearts and has its own items

704.name: Berserk!
704.description: Temporary +3 dmg and melee attack. This item charge by damaging enemies

705.name: Dark Arts
705.description: Turn into shadow form, phase through enemies to deal damage 2 sec after, more damage dodged = more dmg up

706.name: Abyss
706.description: Destroys any item in the room and turn it into permanent red locusts that attack by dashing at enemies

708.name: Stapler
708.description: Tears only come out from the player's right eye

709.name: Suplex!
709.description: Dash into an enemy, grab it and slam it on the ground. Dmg scales on player's size

710.name: Bag of Crafting
710.description: Take pickups to transform them into items

711.name: Flip
711.description: Each pedestal that is part of the room layout will have 2 items. Use Flip to have the second item

712.name: Lemegeton
712.description: Spawn an item wisp that grants the effect of a random passive item until it dies

713.name: Sumptorium
713.description: Spawn a lil clot for half a heart. On T. Eve : convert clots to health

714.name: Recall
714.description: Sends back tainted Forgotten's body to the owner

715.name: Hold
715.description: Allows you to stock a Tainted Blue Baby poop and throw it later

716.name: Keeper's Sack
716.description: +1 key and +3 coins, gives a dmg/range/speed bonus that scales with the amount of money spent in shops

717.name: Keeper's Kin
717.description: Rocks drop 1-3 spiders when destroyed, rocks can spawn blue spider in room with enemies in it

720.name: Everything Jar
720.description: Can be used anytime, various rewards depending on charge level

721.name: TMTRAINER
721.description: Causes all future items become glitched, giving fully randomized effects

722.name: Anima Sola
722.description: Summons chains around nearest enemy and temporarily prevent it from moving

723.name: Spindown Dice
723.description: Rerolls each item in the room into the item before it in numerical ID order

724.name: Hypercoagulation
724.description: On hit, spawns half a red heart that quickly disappears. Spawned heart's velocity increase the more you take damage

725.name: IBS
725.description: Causes you to throw a random type of poop at random intervals + chance to have Explosive Diarrhea when standing still

726.name: Hemoptysis
726.description: Double tap to sneeze on enemies, dealing 1.5x dmg

727.name: Ghost Bombs
727.description: +5 bombs, bombs spawn a friendly white soul which hunt down enemies

728.name: Gello
728.description: A baby that come from your belly and deals 3x dmg when it hit enemies, can also shoot tears

729.name: Decap Attack
729.description: Throw your head to deal 24 damage

731.name: Stye
731.description: Damage up/range up/shot speed down on the right eye
